\tzpentry{ID3597}{Gyro IOmega Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3597 introduces Gyro IOmega Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\mathcal{L}_{\text{coupling}}}{T_{\text{gyro}}} \sim \frac{g\mu_B L}{I\omega^2} \sim 10^{-20} \text{ (negligible classically)} \end{equation}
